title: KKR-Backed Global Medical Response Said to Pick Banks for US IPO
description: Global Medical Response has selected banks for an initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter, as the KKR & Co.-backed air and ground emergency medical services company joins a growing list of firms seeking to tap investors.
content: Global Medical Response has selected banks for an initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter, as the KKR & Co.-backed air and ground emergency medical services company joins a growing list of firms seeking to tap investors.
